final:
// // This module implements a synchronous OR gate with an enable signal.
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input EN,
    input CLK,
    output reg Z
);always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (EN) begin
            Z <= A ^ B;
        end else begin
            Z <= 0;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a synchronous OR gate with an enable signal.
